name: Mr. X
cardiac_status: Stents in coronary arteries. ALL analysis must be cardiac-safe and anti-inflammatory at its core. This is the highest priority constraint in every response.

medications.name: Thyroxin Sodium
interactions: Do NOT pair with soy products at this meal
Do NOT pair with raw cruciferous vegetables at this meal
Do NOT pair with high-fiber foods at this meal
Must be taken strictly on empty stomach — no food within 30 minutes

medications.name: Metoprolol
interactions: Monitor high-sodium foods — keep under 400mg sodium per serving
Avoid sudden high-caffeine intake or large caffeine doses

medications.name: Ticagrelor
interactions: STRICTLY NO grapefruit or grapefruit juice — serious drug interaction
Avoid very high-fat single meals near dose time
Flag if Omega-3 or fish oil is being added — bleeding risk requires cardiologist clearance

medications.name: Inclisiran
interactions: No daily food interaction but supports lipid management goals

medications.name: Pitavastatin
interactions: STRICTLY NO grapefruit or grapefruit juice — serious drug interaction
Avoid very high saturated fat meals
CoQ10 depletion is a known risk — flag if CoQ10 supplementation is not in place

medications.name: Aspirin (Low-Dose)
interactions: STRICTLY take with or right after a meal — even at low doses, it can irritate the stomach lining and increase the risk of GI ulcers over time
Avoid taking other NSAID painkillers (like Ibuprofen, Naproxen, or Diclofenac) without consulting your doctor — they can block aspirin's antiplatelet effects and raise bleeding risks
Limit or avoid alcohol — combining alcohol with daily aspirin significantly increases the risk of bleeding in the digestive tract
Inform your dentist or surgeon before any upcoming procedures — because it alters your blood's clotting ability, it may need to be paused a few days prior

exercise.routine: 15 min treadmill → Legs press, Body weight squats, Chest press, lat pull down, Seated row, Dumbbell shoulder press→ Plank hold (3x30 sec) → 10 min elliptical
exercise.additional: 10 min walk after lunch and dinner 10 mins soleus pump exercise after breakfast, lunch, dinner

lifestyle.profession: Desk job, sedentary 6-8 hours per day
